subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which battle is known as the 'Battle of Haldighati' in Rajasthan?
explanation_en:
The Battle of Haldighati is a famous historical event in Rajasthan, where Maharana Pratap fought against Mughal Emperor Akbar in 1576.
English: The Battle of Haldighati is a famous historical event in Rajasthan, where Maharana Pratap fought against Mughal Emperor Akbar in 1576.
Hindi: राजस्थान में Maharana Pratap ने 1576 में जादूने मोगोल में Maharana Pratap ने Akbar के संघ में मेरी मंगोल के भाग में अर्थ है।
explanation_hi: राजस्थान में Maharana Pratap ने 1576 में जादू में मेरी मंगोल के भाग में अर्थ है।
explanation_en: The Battle of Haldighat refers to the portion of the battle that took place in the territory of Maharana Pratap against the Mughal empire in 1576.
explanation_hi: महाना प्रताप ने 1576 में जादू में मेरी मंगोल के भाग में अर्थ है।

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Who was the queen who ruled Rajasthan during the Mughal rule?

explanation_en:
The Battle of Haldighat was fought between the Rana Pratap and Mughal Emperor Akbar in 1576. The battle took place in Ajmer district.
English: The Battle of Haldighat was fought between Rana Pratap and Mughal Emperor Akbar in 1576. The battle took place in Ajmer district.
question_en: Who fought against Mughal Emperor Akbar in Haldighat?
explanation_en: The Battle of Haldighat took place between Rana Pratap and Mughal Emperor Akbar. Rana Pratap emerged victorious.
